resume_text: Data Scientist with 4 years of experience using Python, SQL, pandas, scikit-learn, and statistics. Built customer churn prediction and demand forecasting models. Strong in feature engineering, data visualization, and communication with business teams.

Machine Learning Engineer experienced in Python, docker, kubernetes, pytorch, tensorflow, and AWS. Built NLP services and model deployment pipelines. Familiar with Git, ETL, and large-scale data processing.
Data Analyst focused on SQL, Excel, Tableau, and Power BI dashboards. Performs A/B testing, business reporting, and stakeholder presentations. Basic Python and statistics for ad hoc analysis.

AI Research Intern with deep learning and natural language processing projects using Python and PyTorch. Worked on text classification and sentiment analysis. Limited exposure to SQL and production tooling.
Business Intelligence Specialist with Excel, Tableau, SQL, and project management skills. Delivers KPI dashboards and weekly performance reviews. No hands-on machine learning experience yet.

Senior Data Scientist with Python, SQL, machine learning, deep learning, scikit-learn, xgboost, AWS, docker, feature engineering, and data mining. Led forecasting and recommendation initiatives end-to-end.
Software Engineer transitioning to data roles. Comfortable with Python, Git, docker, and cloud deployment. Built APIs and automation scripts. Limited background in statistics and analytics.
Applied Scientist with Python, statistics, machine learning, NLP, pandas, scikit-learn, and data visualization. Developed resume parsing and candidate ranking prototypes for HR-tech use cases.
